name: Kapa Hale
tagline: James Beard semifinalist in Kaimuki — hyper-seasonal Hawaiian ingredients in a cozy neighborhood room.
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave and Kaimuki side streets (9th-12th Ave)
talkStory: James Beard semifinalist for Best Chef Northwest & Pacific. Modern take on Hawaii Regional Cuisine — local products combined with ethnic influences showcasing flavors unique to today's Hawaii.
insiderTips: Ask for a seat near the open kitchen if available. Reservations recommended.
